name: Human urine ¹H-NMR physiological panel
source: Bouatra et al. 2013, The Human Urine Metabolome (PLoS ONE 8:e73076) — abundant NMR-quantified core
note: Restricts urine annotation/deconvolution candidates to real urinary metabolites. A broad 0.8–1.3 ppm lipid envelope in a urine sample is a matrix-mismatch flag (urine has no lipoproteins).
